description: Use this form to conduct a thorough investigation of a workplace incident. Complete all applicable fields as accurately as possible. This record is required for OSHA compliance and helps prevent future incidents.
What type of incident occurred?
Name of injured person?
What was the employee's date of hire?
Date of injured person's birth?
Phone number of the injured person?
Street address of the injured person?
Suite or apt number of the injured person?
City of the injured person?
State of the injured person?
Zipcode of the injured person?
Is this employee male or female?
Date of event
What time did the employee begin work on the day of the incident? (e.g. 7:00 AM)
What time did the incident occur? (e.g. 10:30 AM)
What was the exact location of the event?
What was the employee doing just before the incident? Describe the specific activity, tools, and equipment involved.
Describe fully how the accident happened. What sequence of events led to the injury or illness?
What are the names of all witnesses?
What caused the event?
What part of the body was injured? Describe in detail:
What was the nature of the injury or illness? Describe in detail:
What object or substance directly harmed the employee? (e.g. concrete floor, table saw, ammonia)
Were safety regulations in place and used?
If no, why not?

showIf.question: Were safety regulations in place and used?

description: Did the employee go to the doctor, hospital, or ER?
Was the employee treated in an emergency room?

showIf.question: Did the employee go to the doctor, hospital, or ER?

description: Was the employee hospitalized overnight as an in-patient?

description: Hospital or clinic name

description: Name of Doctor

showIf.question: Did the employee go to the doctor, hospital, or ER?

description: How many days was the employee away from work as a result of this incident? (Enter 0 if none)
Was the employee placed on restricted work duties or job transfer as a result of this incident?
If yes, how many days of restricted work or job transfer?

showIf.question: Was the employee placed on restricted work duties or job transfer as a result of this incident?

description: What changes do you suggest to prevent this incident from happening again?
